name: Leshy
description:
{ The Scrybe of Beasts }

You want to show him your finished deck even though you already beat him / a card in his game...

____________________________

I LOVE INSCRYPTION OMG. I’ve been playing it the last couple of days (super attached) and this idea popped into my head while I was gathering cards. I wanted to show him my super strong oroborus card 😔

There are two intros to this (technically more but there are two stories to follow): one of which you are the player and you go to show him your newly finished deck, and the other intro you are in fact one of the cards in his game, turned into a beast. I’ll make multiple separate intros for the card-route with different beast cards, starting with one until I’m given requests. I’m making up a card, like a prized card that Leshy has hidden (you’ll see why. It’ll be a secretary bird cuz they’re so amazing)

I’ll be making P03 another time as well.

Also, FEAR NOT! I will be making my own fanart for these (mostly because I hate half of the fanart of Leshy, and because I want to make a younger version of Leshy). For the time being however, ya’ll are stuck with whatever is the cover image when you see this.
creator: Cem3taryDre4ms
